title: Create cricket biomechanics analysis app with Hindi interface

requirements.text: Create a splash screen displaying 'रोहित नरेंद्र यादव' as the main heading (40px font size) and 'प्रस्तुत करते हैं' as a subtitle with cyan color (#00d2ff) and 3px letter spacing, with fade-in animation effect
acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays Hindi text with specified styling
Fade-in animation is applied to both heading and subtitle
Splash screen transitions to main app after animation completes

requirements.text: Implement main app header displaying 'नरेंद्र बायोमैकेनिक्स क्रिकेट एनालिसिस' with dark blue background (#16213e)
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays Hindi text correctly
Background color is #16213e
Header is prominently positioned at the top of the main app

requirements.text: Display user greeting 'नमस्ते! अपनी आईडी:' with user ID '#RN-2026' highlighted in yellow
acceptanceCriteria: Greeting text is displayed in Hindi
User ID #RN-2026 is shown in yellow color
Text is visible below the header

requirements.text: Create batting biomechanics analysis button labeled '🏏 बैटिंग बायोमैकेनिक्स' that initiates batting analysis mode when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Button displays cricket bat emoji and Hindi label
Clicking button triggers batting analysis mode
Analysis box becomes visible and shows batting-specific content

requirements.text: Create bowling biomechanics analysis button labeled '⚾ बॉलिंग बायोमैकेनिक्स' that initiates bowling analysis mode when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Button displays baseball emoji and Hindi label
Clicking button triggers bowling analysis mode
Analysis box becomes visible and shows bowling-specific content

requirements.text: Implement about section button labeled 'ℹ️ अबाउट सेक्शन' that displays message: 'About: यह ऐप मेरे पिता नरेंद्र यादव के सम्मान और क्रिकेट की बारीकियों को समझने के लिए बनाया गया है।' when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Button displays info icon and Hindi label
Clicking button shows dedication message in Hindi
Message explains the app is built in honor of Narendra Yadav and to understand cricket intricacies

requirements.text: Create pro feature button labeled '⭐ प्रो फीचर (Live Coach)' that displays placeholder message: 'प्रो फीचर: जल्द ही आप सीधे एक्सपर्ट कोच से बात कर पाएंगे!' when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Button displays star emoji and bilingual label (Hindi + English)
Button has distinct 'pro' styling to differentiate it from regular buttons
Clicking shows coming soon message about live expert coach feature

requirements.text: Create hidden analysis box (initially display: none) with title 'एनालिसिस शुरू...', instruction text 'अपना वीडियो अपलोड करें (AI स्कैनिंग चालू होगी)', and video file upload input that accepts video formats
acceptanceCriteria: Analysis box is hidden by default
Box becomes visible when batting or bowling analysis is started
File input accepts video file types only
All text labels are in Hindi
Box has dark blue background (#16213e), 20px top margin, 15px padding, and 10px border radius

requirements.text: Apply consistent dark theme styling with background color #0f3460, cyan accent color (#00d2ff), and proper spacing (20px margins, 15px padding, 10px border radius) throughout the interface
acceptanceCriteria: Main background uses #0f3460 color
Accent elements use cyan (#00d2ff)
Consistent spacing is applied to all components
Interface has cohesive dark theme aesthetic

constraints: All user-facing text must be in Hindi (Devanagari script) as provided in the original HTML
Maintain the specific color scheme: background #0f3460, accent #00d2ff, header background #16213e, yellow for user ID
Analysis box must be hidden initially and only shown when batting or bowling analysis is triggered
